en_title: Kevin Feige Says Marvel Has Movies Planned 'All the Way Up to 2042,' Including a Major X-Men Push and Live-Action Miles Morales
cn_title: 漫威电影规划已排至2042年，X战警将成核心
subtitle: 变种人时代将启

paragraphs.en: Marvel has mapped out its movie plans up to 2042, studio boss Kevin Feige has said, hinting at a "streamlined, simplified" universe post-Avengers: Secret Wars, a big push for the new X-Men, and plans to eventually unveil a live-action Miles Morales.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威影业负责人Kevin Feige表示，漫威已经把电影计划规划至2042年。他还暗示，《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》之后的宇宙会变得「精简、简化」，新版X战警将获得大力推进，真人版Miles Morales最终也会登场。

paragraphs.en: Speaking to Chinese outlet Watching Hollywood during a recent tour of Shanghai, Feige described this year's Avengers: Doomsday and next year's Avengers: Secret Wars as a conclusion to storylines that started before the MCU itself (such as the fates of some original X-Men). At the same time, Feige also contrasted Secret Wars with the climactic Avengers: Endgame, suggesting that 2027's blockbuster would act as a new beginning for the franchise, as well as a conclusion of the Multiverse saga.
paragraphs.cn: Feige最近访问上海期间接受中国媒体「守望好莱坞」采访，将今年的《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》和明年的《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》称为一些甚至早于MCU本身的故事线终点，例如部分初代X战警角色的命运。同时，他把《秘密战争》与高潮之作《复仇者联盟4：终局之战》作了对比，暗示2027年的这部大片不仅会结束多元宇宙传奇，也会成为系列的新起点。

paragraphs.en: "We want to do two things," Feige began (via machine translation). "First, to bring some storylines to a close, those that started long before Iron Man, including the original X-Men characters. Second, to simultaneously set the stage for the future.
paragraphs.cn: Feige首先说道（经机器翻译）：「我们想做两件事。第一，为一些故事线画上句号，包括在《钢铁侠》之前很久就开始的初代X战警角色故事。第二，同时为未来铺路。

paragraphs.en: "Avengers: Endgame was truly an end, and since then, we've tried and experimented with many new things. But [Secret Wars] is a beginning. It will establish a streamlined, simplified, single universe that audiences can keep up with. Some things will be familiar, but many, many things will be entirely new."
paragraphs.cn: 「《复仇者联盟4：终局之战》是真正的终点。从那以后，我们尝试和实验了许多新事物。但《秘密战争》是一个起点。它会建立一个精简、简化、观众能够跟得上的单一宇宙。有些内容会很熟悉，但非常非常多的东西会是全新的。」

paragraphs.en: Feige said that the new don't-call-it-a-reboot post-Secret Wars MCU will hopefully attract a "new generation of audiences" to Marvel, something that tallies with past comments by Feige that, one day, the franchise will eventually bring in new versions of existing heroes such as Iron Man. For now, though, Marvel seems to have one major brand in mind to lead the next saga: the X-Men.
paragraphs.cn: Feige表示，《秘密战争》后这个「别叫它重启」的新版MCU有望为漫威吸引「新一代观众」。这与他过去的说法一致：系列总有一天会引入钢铁侠等现有英雄的新版本。不过眼下，漫威似乎已选定一个重要品牌来引领下一段传奇：X战警。

paragraphs.en: "Fundamentally, the X-Men will be at its core," Feige said. "Acquiring the X-Men rights isn't just about... for example, Wolverine is an outstanding character, and we were able to team him up with Deadpool, which is great. But the X-Men are far more than just Wolverine, far more than the original team; fundamentally, it's a universe, a multi-stage saga. Much of that is what we're working towards."
paragraphs.cn: Feige说：「从根本上讲，X战警会是核心。获得X战警版权不只是为了……比如金刚狼是个出色角色，我们能让他与死侍组队，这很棒。但X战警远不止金刚狼，也远不止初代团队；它从根本上就是一个宇宙、一段多阶段传奇。我们正在推进的许多工作都围绕这一点。」

paragraphs.en: In other words, don't expect Jake Schreier's upcoming X-Men movie to be a one-and-done affair (although, honestly, this always seemed a remote possibility). Instead, the X-Men sound like they'll form the bedrock of Marvel's storytelling in the post-Secret Wars era, which seems fitting, since the next phase will be known as the Mutant Saga.
paragraphs.cn: 换句话说，不要以为Jake Schreier即将执导的《X战警》电影只会拍一部（不过说实话，这种可能性本来就很低）。听起来，X战警将成为《秘密战争》后漫威叙事的基石，这也很合理，因为下一阶段会被称为「变种人传奇」。

paragraphs.en: "We were just in a Marvel Studios meeting room, planning movies all the way up to 2042," Feige revealed. "Whether we can make it to 2042? Who knows? Will it be those movies? Who knows? But this is how we approach and plan the vast amount of potential stories in the comics. We're constantly changing, constantly evolving, but having some guidance helps us act more purposefully… especially with X-Men — it's already had 10 movies, some very, very good, some I think haven't lived up to expectations — how do we plan the Mutant Saga in a very grand way?"
paragraphs.cn: Feige透露：「我们刚刚还在漫威影业会议室里，规划一直到2042年的电影。我们能不能做到2042年？谁知道？最终会不会就是这些电影？谁知道？但面对漫画里海量的潜在故事，我们就是这样思考和规划的。我们一直在改变、不断演化，但有一些方向能帮助我们更有目的地行动……尤其是X战警——它已经有10部电影，有些非常非常出色，有些在我看来没有达到预期——我们该如何以非常宏大的方式规划变种人传奇？」

paragraphs.en: Marvel is set to make a splash at this weekend's San Diego Comic-Con, returning to Hall H for the first time in two years ahead of this month's hugely-anticipated Spider-Man: Brand New Day, and this December's Avengers: Doomsday. Fans are hoping that, alongside more details on both of those, Feige will lift the lid on more of Marvel's future roadmap — maybe not up until 2042, but at least for the next few years.
paragraphs.cn: 漫威将在本周末的圣迭戈动漫展大举亮相，并在阔别两年后重返Hall H。备受期待的《蜘蛛侠：崭新之日》将于本月上映，《复仇者联盟：毁灭之日》则定于今年12月推出。粉丝希望Feige除了披露这两部作品的更多详情，也能揭开漫威未来路线图的一角——不必一直讲到2042年，至少可以谈谈未来几年。

paragraphs.en: Currently, Marvel has not officially announced a launch plan for anything beyond December 2027's Avengers: Secret Wars, though it has acknowledged that its X-Men reboot and Black Panther 3 are in the planning stages. Other projects waiting in the wings include a long-gestating Nova project (now retooled as a movie rather than a Disney+ series), and an ambition to eventually make a Shang-Chi 2.
paragraphs.cn: 目前，漫威尚未正式公布2027年12月《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》之后任何作品的推出计划，但已确认《X战警》重启版与《黑豹3》正在规划。其他待开发项目还包括筹备多年的《Nova》（现已从Disney+剧集改为电影），以及最终制作《尚气2》的意愿。

paragraphs.en: What else could be on Marvel's roadmap, leading up to 2042? While many classic characters feel like they've run their course (it would be a surprise to see Captain America, Ant-Man or Captain Marvel get further standalone films after the financial performance of Brave New World, Quantumania and The Marvels), others still feel like they have some gas left in the tank.
paragraphs.cn: 那么，在通往2042年的漫威路线图上还会有什么？不少经典角色似乎已经完成使命（考虑到《美队4：勇敢新世界》《蚁人与黄蜂女：量子狂潮》和《惊奇队长2》的财务表现，如果美国队长、蚁人或惊奇队长再获独立电影会令人意外），但其他角色看来仍有发挥空间。

paragraphs.en: It would not be a surprise to see Marvel eventually make a Doctor Strange 3, or a Thor 5. I could also see Marvel taking another chance on the Fantastic Four, even if their first outing felt a little underwhelming. And then there's the hugely popular character of Wanda Maximoff, whose eventual return feels inevitable. Could we finally get a solo Scarlet Witch movie?
paragraphs.cn: 漫威最终制作《奇异博士3》或《雷神5》并不奇怪。我也能想象漫威再给神奇四侠一次机会，即使他们首次登场略显乏力。还有人气极高的Wanda Maximoff，她最终回归似乎不可避免。我们会不会终于看到一部绯红女巫独立电影？

paragraphs.en: Most obvious, of course, is more Spider-Man. Sony and Marvel are clearly keen , and Tom Holland has hinted he expects to return for at least one more Spider-Man film , with plans to eventually hand over his webbing capsules to a younger replacement . Holland recently suggested he would be keen to pass the baton to a live-action Miles Morales — and clearly, this is a character on Feige's radar, too.
paragraphs.cn: 最明显的当然是更多《蜘蛛侠》。索尼和漫威显然都有兴趣，Tom Holland也暗示自己预计至少再回归一部《蜘蛛侠》，之后最终把蛛丝发射器交给更年轻的接班人。Holland最近表示，他愿意把接力棒交给真人版Miles Morales；显然，这个角色也已进入Feige的视野。

paragraphs.en: "One of the fun things about this business is that we're always dreaming and coming up with ideas," Feige said when asked about the character. "There's a line in Spider-Man: No Way Home where Electro says, 'Somewhere there's bound to be a black Spider-Man.' Audiences around the world were thrilled because they knew it might be a hint at Miles.
paragraphs.cn: 被问及这个角色时，Feige说：「这项事业有趣的一点是，我们总在畅想并提出新点子。《蜘蛛侠：英雄无归》里有一句台词，电光人说：‘某个地方肯定有一位黑人蜘蛛侠。’世界各地观众都非常兴奋，因为他们知道这可能是在暗示Miles。」

paragraphs.en: "The good news is, Sony has the Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse series, which are very popular and excellent, and Beyond the Universe is coming out next year. But yes, we definitely have plans, and I think a live-action Spider-Man movie has this destiny: to add Miles sometime after the Spider-Verse series ends. We've been thinking and discussing more Spider-Man adventures, regardless of agreements or contracts. My production partner, Amy Pascal, is already working on it, and we've had in-depth discussions about what the next two, three, four, and five Spider-Man movies might be about."
paragraphs.cn: 「好消息是，索尼拥有非常受欢迎、也非常出色的《蜘蛛侠：平行宇宙》系列，《超越宇宙》会在明年上映。不过没错，我们肯定有计划。我认为真人版《蜘蛛侠》电影有这样的命运：在动画蜘蛛宇宙系列结束后的某个时间加入Miles。无论协议或合同如何，我们一直在思考和讨论更多《蜘蛛侠》冒险。我的制片搭档Amy Pascal已经在推进，我们也深入讨论过接下来第二、第三、第四和第五部《蜘蛛侠》电影可能讲什么。」

paragraphs.en: See you in 2042 for Spider-Man 9, then? In the meantime, be sure to keep an eye on IGN this weekend for everything from Marvel at SDCC, including all of the big announcements from Hall H as they happen.
paragraphs.cn: 那么，2042年《蜘蛛侠9》见？与此同时，本周末请继续关注IGN带来的圣迭戈动漫展漫威报道，包括Hall H现场发布的所有重大消息。

summary: Kevin Feige透露漫威影业已规划至2042年的电影蓝图。《复仇者联盟：秘密战争》后，MCU将整合为更精简的单一宇宙，X战警会成为新篇章核心，真人版Miles Morales也在计划中。
opus_summary: 漫威影业已把电影计划排至2042年。《秘密战争》将结束多元宇宙传奇并开启精简单一宇宙，X战警主导后续「变种人传奇」；真人版Miles Morales也计划在动画系列结束后登场。
